name: final completion reviewer prompt

summary.whatChangedOverall: Planning, execute, and specialized prompt specs were migrated into dedicated prompt modules.
remainingKnownGaps: Completion reviewer contract wording still needs one final pass.

contains: This is a whole-plan final completion review, not an ordinary last-scope review.
Evaluate the totality of the work completed for this plan, not just whether each individual scope was previously accepted.
Use `accept_complete` only when the full plan objectives are satisfied and the aggregate implementation is acceptable under ordinary code review standards.
When you return `continue_execution`, you must provide a non-null `missingWork` object
Use `block_for_operator` when the remaining gap is ambiguous
